notes: SHIP 1 — Master Pivot, front door (additive, live EDP path untouched). The Master becomes the source of truth and the deployment front door. (1) NEW STORE: PHANTOM_JOBSNAP_STORE (key 'phantom_jobsnap_v1') — lz-string-compressed, schema-guarded, mirrors PHANTOM_MASTER_STORE's save/load/clear + quota handling, and rejects a content-empty cabs map. Holds one pending SNAPSHOT scoped to the selected cabs only (not the whole site), so it stays under the storage budget and is immune to the cold-start host/cable drop and later Master re-loads/clears. (2) NEW PATH: mscope_* Master-scope front door — load (or reuse) a Master → group racksByCab by Row (cabId prefix before ':') / Locode → multi-select exact Cab IDs (44px tap rows, per-row ALL toggle, sticky cabs/hosts/cables tally) → mscope_confirm() freezes a scoped snapshot from window._lastPhantomMaster into PHANTOM_JOBSNAP_STORE. Reads ONLY racksByCab; writes ONLY the new store. Restored-from-storage cab-only Masters surface a non-blocking RE-LOAD fidelity banner. selectedCabIds + stats are built from the cabs actually captured (capturedIds), so a cab missing from the confirm-time Master cannot desync the manifest from the cabs map. (3) ENTRY: deploy_showList now leads with a full-width 'NEW DEPLOYMENT FROM MASTER' primary CTA (mscope_open); the EDP path is demoted to a ghost '＋ EDP' button + the existing '＋ INTAKE', both still fully reachable. Empty state points at the Master banner with EDP as 'Paste EDP (advanced)'. (4) SHIP 1 BOUNDARY: stages the snapshot ONLY — does NOT create or seed a live deployment and does NOT touch the EDP path (deploy_parseEDP_local / deploy_create / intake + hash gates intact). Explicit SHIP 2 hook left in mscope_confirm for snapshot→Rack-Map seeding + QA/Reconcile (Vendor-EDP vs Engineering-Master) routing. (5) PICKER FOOTER ERGONOMICS (post-verification): added .msc-foot-pad, a 64px scroll runway inserted BEFORE the sticky .msc-actions bar (the footer is the last child of .msc-wrap, so the runway must precede it — padding on the wrap lands below the footer and only gaps at max scroll); added env(safe-area-inset-bottom) to the footer's bottom padding; and swapped the footer background from a translucent gradient to an opaque frosted bar (rgba(5,7,11,0.92) + backdrop blur(16px) + 1px cyan top-border, matching .rd-actions/.dl-actions) so scrolled cab rows are cleanly covered and the last cab clears the footer. New .msc-* CSS is Rule-1 compliant (width:100% + box-sizing:border-box, min-width:0 flex children, ellipsis on long ids; zero horizontal overflow). Existing tokens only, pitch-black preserved. VERIFIED: node-checked (4/4); 5-lens adversarial review (0 confirmed high/critical, 1 medium fixed = the capturedIds manifest-integrity guard); and browser-verified end-to-end on a local server (boot → Master front door → group-by-row → multi-select → snapshot persist; footer clearance 83px + last-cab tappability confirmed at max scroll on a short viewport). Built directly in Claude Code on v1.6.87 — SYNC web-Claude before next handback. Three stamps at v1.6.88.
